items.title: LLM foundations
items.description: Training produces the weights; the LLM foundations topic describes how those weights behave when you send a prompt.

items.title: Constitutional AI intro
items.description: Constitutional AI is Anthropic's principle-based alignment approach within the broader feedback-training stage.

items.title: Anthropic research
items.description: Published alignment and scaling research motivates training and evaluation practices.

items.title: Knowledge cutoff
items.description: Pretraining data ends at a point in time; cutoff explains stale or missing facts in base knowledge.

items.title: Anthropic's approach to safety
items.description: Later safety stage connects training choices to deployment policies and guardrails.
